tracked_assets.name: ERC-20 Asset Token
accounting_variables: ERC20Upgradeable._balances (total supply and per-account via ERC-4626)
tracked_assets.risk: Fee-on-transfer tokens would cause share/asset accounting mismatch

tracked_assets.name: Chamber Shares (ERC-20)
tracked_assets.custody: Depositors; locked portions tracked in totalAgentDelegations
tracked_assets.risk: Evicted node delegation lock (Finding 11): totalAgentDelegations can exceed recoverable amount

tracked_assets.name: ETH (Ether)
tracked_assets.risk: Arbitrary ETH transfers via multisig; no per-recipient limit

tracked_assets.name: Board Delegation Votes
tracked_assets.risk: Node eviction can strand delegations; max 100 nodes enforced

tracked_assets.name: Agent Identity NFTs
tracked_assets.risk: Minting restricted to REGISTRAR_ROLE; no burn mechanism

invariants: balanceOf(user) >= totalAgentDelegations[user] at all times (enforced by _update)
Board nodes are sorted descending by amount
